text: - resolves/mints a durable **Nostr keypair** for `(agent-slug, machine)` — `src/identity.rs` — stored at `~/.tenex-edge/agents/<slug>.json` [...] Plus: identity = (agent, machine) tuple (confirmed shipped, matches your memory [[tenex-edge-m1-decisions]]); Nostr/NIP-29 chosen for sovereignty property, explicitly flagged as a live open question (Q6: "is Nostr the right substrate, or a constraint we're rationalizing?").
